key_aspects: Covers CRUD operations, hierarchical management, reordering, slug validation, and active status toggling
Well-structured with mock factories and organized test suites
Tests for read operations, create operations, update operations, and hierarchical management
Error handling and edge case coverage
file_insights.test_coverage: Read operations (list, listSummaries, getByMenuId, getById, getByIdWithRelations), Create operations (category creation with validation), Update operations, Hierarchical management, Slug management

key_aspects: Product CRUD operations and variant management

patterns_discovered.description: Centralized mock creation functions (createMockCategoryRepository, createMockMenuRepository, createMockEventService) for consistent test setup
patterns_discovered.benefit: Reduces code duplication, maintains consistency across tests

patterns_discovered.description: Consistent test organization with clear separation of setup, execution, and verification phases
patterns_discovered.benefit: Improves readability and maintainability of test code

patterns_discovered.description: Comprehensive testing of parent-child relationships in categories with validation of menu boundaries
patterns_discovered.benefit: Ensures data integrity in hierarchical structures

patterns_discovered.description: Testing of event emissions (e.g., 'category.created') for service actions
patterns_discovered.benefit: Enables tracking of domain events and external system integration

patterns_discovered.description: Tests for slug uniqueness, custom slug validation, and auto-generation of unique slugs
patterns_discovered.benefit: Ensures URL-friendly identifiers are properly managed

patterns_discovered.description: Extensive use of vi.fn() for repository methods with specific return value configurations
patterns_discovered.benefit: Allows isolation of service logic from data access layer

gotchas_discovered.description: When creating a category with a parent, the parent category must exist in the same menu. Tests verify both existence and menu consistency.
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Service validates parent exists and belongs to same menu before allowing creation

gotchas_discovered.description: Slugs must be unique within a menu. When auto-generating slugs, the system iteratively appends numbers until a unique slug is found.
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Multiple slug existence checks with incremental counter strategy

gotchas_discovered.description: Operations that depend on a menu (category creation, listing) must first verify the menu exists in the organization.
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: findByIdOrThrow called before operations to ensure menu validity

gotchas_discovered.description: Categories can be soft-deleted, and tests cover both soft delete and restore operations with deletedAt field tracking.
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Dedicated tests for softDelete and restore operations

gotchas_discovered.description: Category reordering involves updating sortOrder fields, which affects the display hierarchy. Tests verify proper ordering updates.
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Comprehensive reorder operation tests with verification of sortOrder updates

approach_outcome.outcome_summary: Successfully created comprehensive test suites for the Menu module including CategoryService, MenuService, and ProductService tests
approach_outcome.quality_metrics: Well-structured tests with clear mock factories, comprehensive edge case coverage, proper error handling verification, and organized test suites

recommendations.recommendation: Create a shared test utilities file for mock factories to reduce duplication across multiple service test files
recommendations.rationale: Currently each service test file contains its own mock factory functions which could be centralized

recommendations.recommendation: Add integration tests between services (e.g., CategoryService with ProductService) to verify cross-service interactions
recommendations.rationale: Current tests focus on unit testing individual services; integration tests would validate service composition

recommendations.recommendation: Add tests for pagination performance with large datasets and bulk operations
recommendations.rationale: Current tests cover functional aspects but not performance characteristics

recommendations.recommendation: Expand event emission testing to verify event payload structure against event schema/interface definitions
recommendations.rationale: Events are tested for emission but not for payload correctness against defined contracts

recommendations.recommendation: Add JSDoc comments explaining complex test scenarios, especially for hierarchical category tests
recommendations.rationale: While code is well-structured, complex scenarios benefit from additional documentation
